subcodes.first_line: O thou tree, swayed by the breeze of God! Blessed art thou for having turned thy face towards Him through Whom the earth hath been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشجر المهتز بنسمه الله طوبی لک بما وجهت وجهک للذی اشرقت الارض
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
